text:
There was an old man who lived alone. Every morning, he would wake up slowly, rubbing his eyes. Soon, he would stroll down the quiet street.

The town was peaceful. Birds sang softly, and the streetlights twinkled.

One evening, darkness descended over the town.

The old man went outside.

In the darkness...

Something moved...
